mission.title: valkey: [LEGAL] Please remove my copyright notice from the source code
mission.description: [LEGAL] Please remove my copyright notice from the source code. Requested by 29+ users.

steps.title: Check current valkey setup
steps.description:
Verify your valkey version and configuration:
```bash
valkey-server --version
```
This feature requires a working valkey installation.

steps.title: Review valkey configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant valkey configuration:
Dear friends,

sorry to bother you with this request, but the copyright setups I reached in the past with Redis Ltd demands some change.
Years ago, I sold the copyright of the Redis source code, the brand and the logo to Redis Ltd.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [LEGAL] Please remove my copyright notice from the source…
steps.description:
Hi Viktor!

> The other change (mostly completed now) is to get rid of the Redis trademark everywhere. :)

Indeed, this step was somewhat more obvious, the copyright things are a bit more complex sometimes when liberal licenses apply, since the licensing terms even when very liberal still don't override the copyright matters. Also while hacking I was focused on other stuff, and the exact dates of the contracts where regulated in peculiar ways so I totally forgot to update the copyright notice

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[LEGAL] Please remove my copyright notice from the source…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hi Viktor!

> The other change (mostly completed now) is to get rid of the Redis trademark everywhere. :)

Indeed, this step was somewhat more obvious, the copyright things are a bit more complex sometimes when liberal licenses apply, since the licensing terms even when very liberal still don't override the copyright matters.

prerequisites.description: A working valkey installation or development environment.
